verdicts.note: Opposition to a specifically characterized green-energy tax supports the climate affordability axis, but does not establish his broader position on the taxes axis's high-earner and wealth revenue tension.
The dossier says only 'universal health care.' It does not establish a single-payer or universal public-insurance mechanism required for the +2 pole.
Lowering health-care costs alone does not prove a strengthen-the-current-system position; the basis improperly treats the absence of a replacement proposal as affirmative evidence.

missing.basis: The dossier identifies her as the incumbent who has represented the district since 2019, a maximal proven-tenure profile within this field.
